checks.name: operational_questions_complete
checks.detail: 9 operational questions (OQ-1 through OQ-9) defined. Each maps to at least one CF. No CF orphaned.

checks.name: cf_coverage_complete
checks.detail: All 10 CFs (CF-01 through CF-10) covered. CF-08 cross-cutting. No orphan CFs, no capability without CF grounding.

checks.name: capability_count_justified
checks.detail: 9 capabilities: 8 primitives + 1 composite. Below 6 = CF gaps. Above 9 = candidates need unavailable evidence or prohibited reasoning.

checks.name: tier_classification_consistent
checks.detail: Tier 1 (3): STP, PI, SQP — system vital signs. Tier 2 (4): DF, CL, CP, IE — condition-dependent. Tier 3 (2): EC, VC — artifact-dependent.

checks.name: composite_primitive_clean
checks.detail: 8 primitives resolve independently. 1 composite (DF) derives from resolved primitives (PI+CP+CL+VC). No circular dependencies.

checks.name: genesis_readiness_honest
checks.detail: 6/9 READY_FOR_REASONING, 3/9 PARTIAL (PI, EC, VC). 0/9 BLOCKED. READY_FOR_REASONING distinguished from READY_FOR_FULL_PRODUCT_PROJECTION.

checks.name: current_contract_migration_mapped
checks.detail: All 6 current contracts mapped: 4 keep/rename, 1 split (OPERATIONAL_TOPOLOGY → STP+PI), 1 transform (PROPAGATION_RISK → CP). 2 new (EC, VC).

checks.name: topology_behavior_per_capability
checks.detail: All 9 capabilities specify topology behavior: what changes on SVG when activated, what dims, what emphasizes.

checks.name: panel_mutation_per_capability
checks.detail: All 9 capabilities specify left panel mutation (interpretation) and right panel mutation (guided queries + actions).

checks.name: orchestration_implication_per_capability
checks.detail: All 9 capabilities specify how findings feed Layer 2 orchestration. No capability owns orchestration actions.

checks.name: stp_boundary_defined
checks.detail: STP answers 'what does topology shape imply operationally?' — not generic statistics. Failure condition: statistics dashboard = regression.

checks.name: sqp_boundary_defined
checks.detail: SQP interprets qualification for operational trust — does NOT render governance lifecycle, SQO transitions, or action logs. Failure condition: governance rendering = regression.

checks.name: layer_boundaries_enforced
checks.detail: All 9 capabilities are Layer 3. None compute truth (L1) or own orchestration (L2). Evidence adapter enforces boundary.

checks.name: failure_conditions_defined
checks.detail: 7 failure conditions defined: 9 stacked cards, topology unchanged, SQP regression, STP regression, capability owns orchestration, raw fullReport access, no cognition state transition.

checks.name: implementation_sequence_defined
checks.detail: 5 phases: A (Model Lock — this stream), B (Evidence Adapter), C (Contract Refactoring), D (Cognition State Projection), E (Orchestration Integration).

checks.name: no_code_changes
checks.detail: Stream produces definition artifacts only. No code files modified.

checks.name: no_new_terms
checks.detail: All terms used (Software Intelligence, Domain Cognition Module, Marketplace, etc.) already locked in TERMINOLOGY_LOCK.md.

checks.name: capability_neq_panel_doctrine
checks.detail: Foundational doctrine established: capability = runtime cognition state (topology focus + state transition + adaptive panels + query adaptation + evidence drilldown + orchestration implication), NOT rendered panel.
